title: Deploy and monitor applications on Azure Kubernetes Service
summary: Learn how to deploy, configure, and troubleshoot apps on Azure Kubernetes Service.

sections.title: Deploy and monitor applications on Azure Kubernetes Service
sections.summary: Learn how to deploy, configure, and troubleshoot apps on Azure Kubernetes Service.

lessons.title: Deploy applications to Azure Kubernetes Service
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to deploy applications to Azure Kubernetes Service.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/deploy-apps-azure-kubernetes-service/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Deploy applications to Azure Kubernetes Service

lessons.title: Configure applications on Azure Kubernetes Service
lessons.content_md:
Externalize configuration, secure sensitive settings, and attach persistent storage for applications running on Azure Kubernetes Service.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/configure-apps-azure-kubernetes-service/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Configure applications on Azure Kubernetes Service

lessons.title: Monitor and troubleshoot applications on Azure Kubernetes Service
lessons.content_md:
Monitor application health, debug issues, and verify connectivity for AI workloads running on Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS).

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/monitor-apps-azure-kubernetes-service/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Monitor and troubleshoot applications on Azure Kubernetes Service

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Deploy and monitor applications on Azure Kubernetes Service
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Deploy and monitor applications on Azure Kubernetes Service**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
